title: Article
description: A news article from TheNewsAPI with full metadata.

description.description: Short summary or excerpt of the article.

keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords associated with the article.

snippet.description: Brief text snippet from the article body.

url.description: Full URL to the original article.

image_url.description: URL of the article's primary image, if available.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g., en, es, fr).

published_at.description: UTC timestamp when the article was published.

source.description: Domain of the source publication (e.g., bbc.com).

relevance_score.description: Relevance score when sorting by relevance. Null when not applicable.

locale.description: Country code locale of the article (e.g., us, gb, ca).

similar.description: Array of similar articles (present in headlines response when include_similar=true).
